plan_status: adopted (effective 4 January 2023); draft-plan chapter captured from consultation portal
dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 11 - Land Use Zoning Objectives and Development Standards and Guidelines (Part B - Development Standards)
fetch_method: WebFetch on consult.galwaycity.ie Part B chapter (clean markdown, very detailed) + curl.exe raw HTML saved to raw/dm_standards.html
notes: Richly quantified chapter: plot ratios by zone, site coverage 80%, open space %, car-parking Table 11.6 and residential options, cycle Table 11.3, separation 11m/1.5m, rural one-off site min 0.2ha, fuel-station sightline/setbacks, EV (1 per 5 spaces), bin storage, road/footpath widths, childcare 55% play area. Full assessment-trigger list present (AA, EIA, FRA, TTA thresholds, heritage, EcIA, sustainability statement). Captured from draft-plan chapter; adopted plan content materially the same.
